tests.name: graphView/provider/file/actions delegates file navigation helpers through their extracted provider wrappers

graphView/provider/file/actions uses vscode input and error defaults for create actions
graphView/provider/file/actions uses the undo manager default for favorite toggles

DeleteFilesAction should have correct description for multiple files

DeleteFilesAction should handle multiple files
RenameFileAction should have correct description

RenameFileAction should reverse rename on undo

RenameFileAction should not modify favorites when renaming non-favorited file
CreateFileAction should have correct description
CreateFileAction should create file and open in editor on execute
CreateFileAction should delete file on undo

Chained Undo Operations should maintain state consistency when interleaved with other operations
